code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_line()
  let s = match line
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    ""
  end
  mut depth = 0
  mut bad = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 40
      depth = depth + 1
    else if b == 41
      if depth == 0
        bad = true
      else
        depth = depth - 1
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if bad or depth != 0
    print("NO")
  else
    print("YES")
  end
end
